name: ai-ship-gate
description: A deterministic release gate for AI-generated code.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && esbuild src/action.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/action.js --sourcemap --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
